## Animato v1.7.0 — Motion Macro

Animato v1.7.0 ships the Motion Macro — a declarative `animato!{}` DSL layer
that turns Animato from a powerful low-level animation engine into a high-level
animation authoring toolkit, while preserving the stable renderer-agnostic core.

### Highlights

- New `animato-macro` crate with a procedural macro DSL for declarative
  animation authoring — tweens, springs, keyframes, timelines, stagger
  patterns, motion paths, morphing, SVG draw, color interpolation, waveforms,
  and built-in presets.
- Seven public macros: `animato!{}`, `motion!{}`, `tween!{}`, `spring!{}`,
  `timeline!{}`, `keyframes!{}`, `preset!{}`.
- Five feature-gated framework helper macros: `leptos_motion!{}`,
  `dioxus_motion!{}`, `yew_motion!{}`, `bevy_motion!{}`, `wasm_motion!{}`.
- Twenty-three built-in animation presets: `fade_in`, `fade_out`, `slide_in`,
  `slide_out`, `scale_in`, `scale_out`, `bounce_in`, `bounce_out`,
  `modal_enter`, `modal_exit`, `drawer_open`, `drawer_close`, `toast_enter`,
  `toast_exit`, `page_enter`, `page_exit`, `stagger_children`,
  `loading_pulse`, `loading_wave`, `shake`, `wiggle`, `heartbeat`, `float`,
  `shimmer`.
- New `prelude` module on the `animato` facade for ergonomic macro-friendly
  imports.
- Twelve new examples demonstrating every DSL category.
- Five new documentation files covering the macro guide, full DSL grammar,
  copy-paste recipes, framework helpers, and expansion reference.
- Full `trybuild` compile-pass and compile-fail test suite with span-aware
  diagnostics and "did you mean…?" suggestions.
- Runtime parity tests verifying macro-generated animations match manual
  builder construction.
- The `macro` feature is opt-in and non-default — `no_std` users and focused
  sub-crate users are completely unaffected.

### Install

```toml
[dependencies]
animato = "1.7.0"
```

```toml
[dependencies]
animato = { version = "1.7.0", features = ["macro"] }
```

```sh
npm install @aarambhdevhub/animato-core
```

### Crates published to crates.io

| Crate | Version | Description |
|-------|---------|-------------|
| `animato-core` | `1.7.0` | Traits, interpolation, easing, and inspection primitives |
| `animato-color` | `1.7.0` | Perceptual color wrappers |
| `animato-tween` | `1.7.0` | `Tween<T>` and keyframe tracks |
| `animato-spring` | `1.7.0` | Scalar and component springs |
| `animato-path` | `1.7.0` | Bezier, SVG paths, motion paths, morphing |
| `animato-physics` | `1.7.0` | Inertia, drag, and gesture recognition |
| `animato-driver` | `1.7.0` | Drivers, clocks, recording, inspection, profiling |
| `animato-timeline` | `1.7.0` | Timeline, sequence, and stagger composition |
| `animato-gpu` | `1.7.0` | GPU/CPU fallback batch tween evaluation |
| `animato-wasm` | `1.7.0` | rAF and DOM helpers |
| `animato-bevy` | `1.7.0` | Bevy integration plugin |
| `animato-leptos` | `1.7.0` | Leptos signal hooks and components |
| `animato-dioxus` | `1.7.0` | Dioxus signal hooks and native helpers |
| `animato-yew` | `1.7.0` | Yew hooks, components, gestures, and agents |
| `animato-devtools` | `1.7.0` | Timeline inspector, easing editor, spring visualizer, recorder, perf monitor |
| `animato-macro` | `1.7.0` | Declarative `animato!{}` Motion Macro DSL |
| `animato-js` | `1.7.0` | WASM bindings published to NPM as `@aarambhdevhub/animato-core` |
| `animato` | `1.7.0` | Stable facade crate |

### Verification

- `cargo fmt --check`
- `cargo clippy --workspace --all-features -- -D warnings`
- `cargo test --workspace --all-features`
- `cargo test --workspace --no-default-features`
- `cargo test -p animato --all-features --examples`
- `cargo test -p animato-macro`
- `cargo test -p animato --features macro --test trybuild_suite`
- `cargo test -p animato --features macro --test macro_runtime_parity`
- `cargo doc --workspace --all-features --no-deps`
- WASM checks for framework crates, `animato-js`, and `animato-devtools`
- JavaScript package build, browser tests, and examples
- `cargo bench --workspace --no-run`
- `cargo publish --dry-run` for every crate before publish
